content.en:
Holy City, Heavenly Pavilion.

When Ye Tian was in retreat, he suddenly opened his eyes.

"Someone on Earth has touched my formation!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

He values the earth very much, and it is his hometown after all.

It can even be said that the importance of the earth is even more important to him than a star field, and he will never allow anything to happen to the earth.

It is precisely because of this that he has arranged many means on the earth, such as not allowing the strong above the True God level to stay on the Earth, and not allowing the strong above the True God level to enter the Earth.

Not long ago, he returned to the earth and personally arranged a formation containing powerful rules, even if the dominant-level powerhouse entered the earth, he would be sensed by this formation, and the weak master could not even enter the earth.

But now, someone has touched the formation and entered the earth.

"Very powerful juggernaut!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And the powerful ruler of the human race basically knows that the earth is his hometown, and without his permission, he will not rashly enter the earth.

But now, someone has gone in.

"Alien domination!"

Ye Tian guessed.

"Hmph, don't say it's the master, even if it's Tianzun, if you dare to destroy the earth, you have to die!"

Swish!

Ye Tian was out of the customs and rushed to the Milky Way Earth at the fastest speed.

He was so fast now that he was back on Earth in a few moments.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's copying talent enveloped the entire earth, and the ability of the Life Heavenly Pupil was also opened.

Moment.

Ye Tian sensed a special existence on the earth.

"Sixth-Order Life!"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank.

He wasn't afraid of a sixth-order life, but he was shocked that a sixth-order lifeform would appear here.

There are many sixth-order lifeforms in the Origin Realm, because the Origin Realm is special, and in the main space of the universe, sixth-order lifeforms are too rare, and most of the Supremes are only pseudo-fifth-order lifeforms!

Moreover, that sixth-order life was just a master!

The Domination level has reached the sixth order of life, which is no less than him before entering the Origin Realm!

Moreover, the aura of this master is very strong and strong, much stronger than that son of the Aurora Era of the Twelve Universe Eras.

"This master is very unfamiliar, it seems that he is not the son of those eras of the twelve universe eras, but there is absolutely no such anti-heaven existence among the masters of all races!"

Ye Tian didn't know the identity of this master, but his heart was very dignified.

Once a strong man like them fought, the earth would be annihilated in an instant.

"Hopefully this guy is just passing by!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

Earth.

Hamon saw Ye Tian and immediately frowned.

"So fast?"

He was a little surprised, he thought that Ye Tian would arrive later, but he didn't expect to come so soon.

"But it's just a little beyond my expectations, and it won't affect my plans!"

Harmon sneered.

At this time, Ye Tian said: "Why did Your Excellency trespass on my earth without permission, please make it clear, otherwise I will think that this is your provocation to me!"

"Just a master, dare to be presumptuous in front of me!"

Harmon said coldly, and five fingers grabbed Ye Tian, as if he wanted to suppress a void.

The rules of terror ripple like they are enough to make any juggernaut despair.

However, just as Harmon made a move, Ye Tian also made a move in an instant.

Since Harmon dares to make a move, he is an enemy, and he naturally will not sit idly by.

However, in order not to affect the earth, he directly cast a time magic power - the wheel of time!

He rarely casts the Wheel of Time, because the enemies he has encountered are weaker than him, and enemies that are too strong are of little use to the Wheel of Time.

Unless he's an evenly matched enemy, he casts the Wheel of Time.

At this moment, Ye Tian cast the wheel of time and directly dragged Harmon into the loop of time.

In order to prevent Harmon from having the means to break the time cycle of the wheel of time, Ye Tian personally entered the time loop and fought with Harmon in the dimension of time.

Time dimension.

Harmon appeared here and immediately sneered: "Time supernatural power, it's a pity that this great supernatural power can't trap me!"

Just as he was about to break through here, Ye Tian appeared.

Seeing Ye Tian appear, he simply didn't want to destroy the time loop, after all, he didn't want to destroy the earth, in case it caused a change in the secret realm, causing the secret realm to be revealed, it would not be a good thing.

Therefore, it is naturally better to be able to catch Ye Tian here.

"You are Ye Tian, it is rumored that you are the first genius of this universe, I don't know if you can bring me a trace of fun!" Harmon said with a smile.

"This man knows me, but he is not afraid of me?"

Ye Tian thought a lot in his heart.

Obviously, Harmon is definitely not weak, and he is not worried even if he is trapped in the time loop.

It's a fierce rival!

Immediately, Ye Tian unleashed the Spear of the Hell Divine Sky and stabbed at Hamon.

It's a temptation!

Burst!

The Hell's Spear pierced through, and Harmon just threw a punch.

Click!

The Spear of the Hell Divine Sky shattered, turning into a spatial rule and escaping.

But Harmon was not comfortable, and his fists trembled slightly.

"How can you be so strong!!"

Harmon was shocked, but remained calm.

Immediately, his eyes flashed, but he had performed some kind of pupil-like secret technique.

"What, Seventh-Order Life !!"

Harmon was shocked.

If he was at his peak, a seventh-order life was nothing, because he himself was a seventh-order peak life.

But this is the universe, he doesn't have too many resources, and the reincarnated body is also relatively ordinary, and he has exhausted a lot of resources before cultivating to the sixth order late life level, and it is too difficult to cultivate to the seventh order life level.

And what he didn't expect was that Ye Tian turned out to be a seventh-order life!

"However, Ye Tian's cultivation time is short, so it shouldn't be strong in other conveniences. I am now the ultimate master, but I can exert the combat power of a first-class Heavenly Venerable, and my life-saving ability even exceeds that of a fifth-class Heavenly Venerable, so I don't need to worry about anything!"

Harmon thought to himself.

The other side.

Ye Tian saw that the Hell Divine Sky Spear failed to break through Hamon's defenses, and he had a rough estimate in his heart.

Harmon was strong, but not too strong, otherwise his fists wouldn't have trembled.

"Quick Fix!"

Ye Tian planned to say.

Rumble!!!

The Chaos Origin Ancient Well shrouded the whole body, the fifth form of the Tiangang Battle Method was opened, and various talents were opened one by one......

"Hunyuan Slash!"

Ye Tian directly performed his strongest move, and he didn't want an accident to happen.

Hunyuan Slash's blow was enough to match the full force of the fourth-rank supreme's blow, although he only had the power of one blow, he didn't think that Harmon had the ability to resist Hunyuan Slash!

Bang!!!

The sword of Hunyuan Slash condensed a little, tore through the time dimension, and slashed towards Hamon.

This blow even froze time and space, and unless there was a means of escaping against the sky, there was no way to dodge this blow at all.

Hamon, who has always been extremely indifferent, was really flustered at this moment.

"This blow...... How is it possible, he is just the master!!"

Harmon's pupils shrank in disbelief.

He has always looked down on the so-called genius of this universe, even if Ye Tian is called the first genius of the universe, he doesn't pay much attention to it, and even thinks that capturing Ye Tian is a matter of being caught.

But now, he knew that he was wrong, even too wrong!

The Domination Realm can unleash a full force blow comparable to that of a fourth-rank supreme, how against the sky, even in the chaos, such a genius is extremely rare!

And without a powerful inheritance in the universe, how could such a genius be born against the sky!

Wouldn't such a genius be even more terrifying if he entered the chaos!

"Mixed Yuan One Qi Talisman!"

"Divine Light Shield!"

"Ten Light Shields!"

"Immortal!"

......

A door method was instantly used by Hamon, but under the blow of Hunyuan's slash, they were shattered.

Eventually, the sword light broke through Hamon's body and completely hit him hard.

But the light on Hamon's body flashed, and the injury was stabilized.

"Run!"

A new spell appeared in Harmon's hand, containing the power of time.

"Time Blade Talisman, Break!"

The rules of time turned into a sharp blade, and instantly broke through this time dimension, which is equivalent to breaking the wheel of time.

The next moment.

Harmon is gone!

"I didn't even kill him!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

This is a full-strength blow comparable to that of a fourth-rank supreme, few people in the Heavenly Venerable realm can survive, but one of the masters of Hamon has survived.

"This man has a great background, and he can't be allowed to live!"

Ye Tian said firmly.

Hamon's escape technique is extremely fast, even comparable to the Supreme, but Ye Tian has a life pupil, which can sense a wide range of life breath, as long as Hamon is locked, it is difficult for Hamon to escape.

"Chase!"

Ye Tian chased after the past in an instant.

chased and fled, and the two quickly left the panel.

......

"I can't get rid of it, damn it, this guy is a seventh-order lifeform and has a life pupil. If I step into the Heavenly Venerable, I will naturally have a way to shield the ability of the Life Heavenly Pupil, maybe my treasure in the chaos is still there, and it is enough to shield the Life Heavenly Pupil, but now I can't block this ability! And this guy actually has a super god-level space-time talent, God, there are few such geniuses in the chaos. This guy's talent is terrifying, how could such a rebellious existence be born in a small universe!"

Harmon is panicked, panicked!

He was confident to escape at the hands of a fourth-rank supreme, but he didn't have the confidence to be able to escape from Ye Tian's hands.

Soon, Ye Tian caught up with Harmon and attacked and killed Harmon again and again.

Harmon also wanted to use a spell to bombard Ye Tian, but Ye Tian's Chaos Origin Ancient Well's defense was too perverted to hurt Ye Tian at all.

"Ye Tian even has the prototype of the Chaos Divine Power that the Origin Well Water Fragment has turned into! Fortunately, he didn't cultivate the Chaos Divine Power, otherwise he would be invincible to the Supreme Level of this universe with his defensive ability alone!"

Harmon's pupils shrank, and he could even say he was very jealous.

He didn't have such a great opportunity in the chaos, and Ye Tian, who lacked resources in the universe, actually had such a great creation.

After one fight after another, Hamon's injuries became more and more serious.

"Ye Tian, let's stop, there is no hatred between us, I am willing to pay a certain price to save my life, how about it?"

Harmon bowed his head and began to beg for mercy.
